productDisplayName: Timberland Men Claremont Popl Black Shirt
description: CompositionBlack full sleeve shirt made of 100% organic cotton,  with tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar,  appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pocket on left chest with black thread detailing and embroidered logo , full length buttoned placket with embroidered logo on right sleeve, and curved hemlineFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash separately before wearing for the first time Wash dark colours separately only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal Warm iron Dry cleanable Time to look like the classic rugged hero right out of a Hollywood movie! This black shirt from timberland has been specially dyed to give it a weathered look, making it ideal for outdoor wear. Team it with well-fitting jeans and rugged boots to look like a young Indiana Jones!This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner, with the aim to reduce the Carbon FootprintModel statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
